# AMTECH Agent Skills

> Free AMTECH skills that teach AI agents how to use them from one link.

- [OKF Audit Skill](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit): A consumable AMTECH skill for auditing articles, websites, drafts, sitemaps, and OKF bundles for AI-readable knowledge quality.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/okf-audit/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/d53b6c8c51bd95ccf09f80f8ed757c608aa56034/skills/okf-audit)
- [Knowledge Graph Builder](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder): A consumable AMTECH skill that generates a large knowledge graph for SEO and AI-readable content from a business, website, product, or topic.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/knowledge-graph-builder/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/d53b6c8c51bd95ccf09f80f8ed757c608aa56034/skills/knowledge-graph-builder)
- [Estimate Skill](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate): A consumable AMTECH skill that builds a clean, structured job estimate from a described job and the rates you provide.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/estimate/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/d53b6c8c51bd95ccf09f80f8ed757c608aa56034/skills/estimate)
- [Article Research Writer](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer): A consumable AMTECH skill that researches, plans, and drafts an information-gain article brief from a topic, notes, and sources.
  - [Use in any AI](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer/use.md)
  - [Canonical SKILL.md](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer/SKILL.md)
  - [Manifest](https://amtechai.com/skills/amtech-article-research-writer/manifest.json)
  - [GitHub source](https://github.com/benamtech/amtech-skills-registry/tree/d53b6c8c51bd95ccf09f80f8ed757c608aa56034/skills/amtech-article-research-writer)
